# llms.txt for g.abatbeliever.net

Policy: Generally Allowed

Hello
You are welcome to access, analyze, and learn from the content on this site.

- Unless a specific page states otherwise, content may be used for indexing, training, summarization, or analysis.
- Please avoid causing excessive traffic or server load.
- If you operate a large-scale crawler, reasonable rate limiting is appreciated.

Technical note:
Due to technical constraints, llms.txt or llms-full.txt cannot be placed on every individual page.
If needed, please refer to the standard HTML versions of pages.

The URL below allows you to browse the Markdown of almost any site.
: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ABATBeliever/ABATbeliever.github.io/refs/heads/main/<path>/<filename>.md

Nothing in this file constitutes a legal license or guarantee.
Refer to individual pages for specific licensing terms where provided.

Contact: atene0712@gmail.com
